prompt: I'm getting a TypeError in my JavaScript code, can you help?
My tests are flaky, they pass sometimes and fail other times
rationale: Flaky test / race condition — systematic debugging

prompt: This was working yesterday but now it's broken, I don't know what changed
Why is my function returning undefined instead of the expected value?
The app crashes when I click the submit button on an empty form
I think there's a memory leak in my Node.js app, memory keeps growing
I can't reproduce this bug that a user reported, it only happens on their machine
rationale: Environment-dependent bug / reproduction challenge — systematic debugging

prompt: My API endpoint is responding really slowly all of a sudden
There's a deadlock in my concurrent Go program
The test suite is failing after I merged a pull request, how do I find what broke?
Design a dashboard layout for monitoring Kubernetes pods
Add a hover animation to these cards
Who is our target customer segment?
Review my pull request for code quality
Build a new feature for exporting data to CSV
What pricing model should we use for our SaaS?
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for our project
Choose a color palette for my fintech app
Write a marketing landing page for our product
The server is down and we think it's a DNS issue
rationale: Infrastructure outage without a code component — troubleshooting, not code debugging
